title: The staged import
description: See exactly what an upload WOULD create -- before a single row is written.

steps.title: Nothing has been written yet
steps.description: This is a preview, not the register.
steps.voiceScript: This is the most important screen in the import. Your file has been read, but nothing has been written to the register yet.
steps.captionText: This is the most important screen in the import. Your file has been read, but nothing has been written to the register yet.
steps.fallbackMessage: Nothing has been written yet: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: What would be created
steps.description: Row by row, exactly as it would land.
steps.voiceScript: Here is every row, exactly as it would land in the register.
steps.captionText: Here is every row, exactly as it would land in the register.
steps.fallbackMessage: What would be created: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Duplicates are caught
steps.description: The same school listed twice, under two codes.
steps.voiceScript: A school listed twice in the same file is caught here -- even under two different codes. The register alone could not catch that, because none of this is in the register yet.
steps.captionText: A school listed twice in the same file is caught here -- even under two different codes. The register alone could not catch that, because none of this is in the register yet.
steps.fallbackMessage: Duplicates are caught: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Invalid rows are rejected
steps.description: Not silently coerced into something wrong.
steps.voiceScript: A row that does not make sense is rejected and told to you, rather than quietly turned into something plausible.
steps.captionText: A row that does not make sense is rejected and told to you, rather than quietly turned into something plausible.
steps.fallbackMessage: Invalid rows are rejected: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Remap a column
steps.description: If the spreadsheet's headings are not ours.
steps.voiceScript: If the spreadsheet's column headings are not the ones we expect, remap them here rather than editing the file.
steps.captionText: If the spreadsheet's column headings are not the ones we expect, remap them here rather than editing the file.
steps.fallbackMessage: Remap a column: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Commit, or cancel
steps.description: Only a commit writes. Cancel leaves no trace.
steps.voiceScript: Only committing writes to the register. Cancelling leaves nothing behind.
steps.captionText: Only committing writes to the register. Cancelling leaves nothing behind.
steps.fallbackMessage: Commit, or cancel: not visible on this screen yet.
